case_title: SHERMAN MINH TANG VS. DANIELLE ADELINE MANSFIELD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,498.00 FILED BY TANG, SHERMAN MINH AS TO DEFENDANT MANSFIELD, DANIELLE ADELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SHERMAN MINH TANG WAS PRESENT. ANNIE LAU IS PRESENT AND AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, ANNIE LAU IS ADDED AS AN ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE AND SERVICE ON ANNIE LAU AS DOES SHE. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, SHERMAN MINH LAU, ANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MANSFIELD, DANIELLE ADELINE AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST ANNIE LAU IS ADDED AS AN ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE AND SERVICE ON ANNIE LAU AS DOES SHE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.
